label: Silver Shield — Financial Bookkeeping Armor

sabbath.notes: No automated processing on Sundays. Manual review only.

dominion_notes: Silver Shield is the financial steward of the ecosystem. It handles bookkeeping, bank statement extraction, transaction categorization, entity separation, parent debt tracing, and discovery compliance for family law proceedings. It produces auditable Excel ledgers with color-coded formulas (blue=inputs, black=formulas, green=cross-sheet links). Subsidiarity applies: automate extraction and categorization, but human reviews all classifications before they become legal assertions. No personal financial data is committed to the repository—all paths are config-driven.

ecosystem_dependencies.stewardship-exchange: CI 42 compliance framework for audit trail integrity
ecosystem_dependencies.continuity-binder: Session handoff pattern for multi-session financial work
ecosystem_dependencies.chief-of-training: Quest model for onboarding new users to the ledger system

data_policy: config-driven paths, no PII in repository, .gitignore enforced
